---
title: "chisqr"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(glue)
library(here)
library(patchwork)

data_pull_date       <- "20250805"
variant              <- "residuals"
tfbpmodeling_version <- "1.0.0"

source(here("R/prepare_data.R"))
source(here("R/chisqr_functions.R"))
source(here("R/theme_ptf.R"))
```

```{r}
# Use predictors/responses already loaded by prepare_data.R.
# `predictors_df` is the raw log-rank binding matrix; `response_df` is the raw
# log-rank response matrix. Both are available as elements of input_data.

# --- pre tfbpmodeling v1.0.0 ---
# predictors_df = read_csv("~/htcf_ref/data/yeast_database_modelling/pull_data_20250805/data/predictors_brent_nf_cc_mcisaac_oe_20250805.csv")
# response_df = read_csv("~/htcf_ref/data/yeast_database_modelling/pull_data_20250805/data/response_brent_nf_cc_mcisaac_oe_20250805.csv")

predictors_df <- input_data$predictors_list$log_rank
response_df   <- input_data$responses_list$log_rank
```

how many binding have minimum rank?

```{r}
predictors_df %>%
    pivot_longer(-target_symbol,
                 names_to = 'regulator_symbol',
                 values_to = 'lrb_norm') %>%
    filter(lrb_norm == 0) %>%
    group_by(regulator_symbol) %>%
    tally() %>%
    pull(n) %>%
    median()
```


```{r}
# see R/prepare_input_data.R for how these are constructed
predictors_df_norm <- input_data$predictors_list$log_rank_normalized
response_df_norm   <- input_data$responses_list$log_rank_normalized
```

```{r}
# stage3_consistent_df contains only interaction terms (all interactors have ":"),
# so every model in it has at least one interaction term.
regulators_with_lassocv_interactions <- unique(stage3_consistent_df$model)

regulators_with_bootstrap_interactions <- ci_df_stage3_bootstrap %>%
    filter(str_detect(interactor, ":")) %>%
    pull(regulator) %>%
    unique()
```

```{r}
chisq_result <- list(stage3_lassocv = list(), stage3_bootstrap = list())

quant_threshold_vector <- c(0.10, 0.15, 0.20)

for (quant_thres in quant_threshold_vector) {
  quant_str <- as.character(quant_thres)

  chisq_result$stage3_lassocv[[quant_str]]  <- list()
  chisq_result$stage3_bootstrap[[quant_str]] <- list()

  for (reg in regulators_with_lassocv_interactions) {
    # Build a minimal significant_predictors_list compatible with the original
    # function: keyed by interaction term, each entry has $interactor.
    # sig_list[[pTF]] returns NULL → compare_confidence_intervals returns "NA".
    model_interactors <- stage3_consistent_df %>%
        filter(model == reg) %>%
        pull(interactor)
    sig_list <- setNames(
        lapply(model_interactors, function(x) list(interactor = x)),
        model_interactors
    )

    chisq_result$stage3_lassocv[[quant_str]][[reg]] <-
      get_interaction_term_chi_squared(
        sig_list,
        predictors_df_norm,
        response_df_norm,
        quantile_cutoff = quant_thres
      )
  }

  for (reg in regulators_with_bootstrap_interactions) {
    ci_df_reg <- ci_df_stage3_bootstrap %>% filter(regulator == reg)

    chisq_result$stage3_bootstrap[[quant_str]][[reg]] <-
      get_interaction_term_chi_squared_stage3_bootstrap(
        ci_df           = ci_df_reg,
        predictors_df   = predictors_df_norm,
        response_df     = response_df_norm,
        quantile_cutoff = quant_thres
      )
  }
}
```

```{r}
print_chi_squared_result <- function(model, interactor, result) {
  # Text summary
  cat(glue::glue(
    "### Model: {model} — Interactor: {interactor}\n\n",
    "**Chi2 Statistic**: {round(as.numeric(result$chi2_stat), 2)}  \n",
    "**P-value**: {signif(as.numeric(result$pvalue), 3)}  \n",
    "**Degrees of Freedom**: {as.numeric(result$dof)}  \n",
    "**Main Effect Comparison**: {result$main_effect_compare}  \n",
    "**Observed > Expected (High pTF in Bottom mTF)**: {result$Low_mTF_High_pTF_observed_gt_expected}  \n",
    "**pTF by Low mTF Slope**: {round(as.numeric(result$ptf_by_low_mtf_slope), 2)}  \n",
    "**pTF by High mTF Slope**: {round(as.numeric(result$ptf_by_high_mtf_slope), 2)}\n\n"
  ))

  # Expected Frequencies Table
  cat("#### Expected Frequencies\n\n")
  print(knitr::kable(result$expected_freq, format = "markdown"))

  # Observed Frequencies Table
  cat("\n#### Observed Contingency Table\n\n")
  print(knitr::kable(result$raw_table, format = "markdown"))
}

# usage
## NOTE: copy/paste this into the console to see a better print
# print_chi_squared_result("MET32", "GAL4", chisq_result$`0.1`$MET32$`MET32:GAL4`)
```


```{r}
# Derive conflicting-sign interactors from stage3_results_df (loaded by
# prepare_data.R) by comparing the sign of coef_interactor against the
# topn CI sign. Interactors where the signs disagree are flagged.

# --- pre tfbpmodeling v1.0.0 ---
# stage3_conflicting_sign = read_csv(here("tmp/reports/conflicting_sign_stage3_interactors_20250805.csv")) %>%
#     mutate(interactor = str_split(interactor, ":", simplify = TRUE)[, 2],
#            conflicting_sign = TRUE)

topn_signs_for_conflict <- ci_df_topn %>%
    select(model = regulator, interactor, topn_sign = sign)

stage3_conflicting_sign <- stage3_results_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(coef_interactor)) %>%
    left_join(topn_signs_for_conflict, by = c("model", "interactor")) %>%
    mutate(conflicting_sign = !is.na(topn_sign) & sign(coef_interactor) != topn_sign) %>%
    filter(conflicting_sign) %>%
    mutate(interactor = str_split(interactor, ":", simplify = TRUE)[, 2]) %>%
    select(model, interactor, conflicting_sign)


# Low_mTF_High_pTF_observed_gt_expected = chisq_res$Low_mTF_High_pTF_observed_gt_expected,

extract_results_df <- function(chisquared_quantile_res) {
    purrr::imap_dfr(
        chisquared_quantile_res,
        function(model_res, model_name) {
            purrr::imap_dfr(model_res, function(chisq_res, term) {
                tibble::tibble(
                    model = model_name,
                    interactor = str_split(term, ":", simplify = TRUE)[2],
                    chi2_stat = chisq_res$chi2_stat,
                    main_effect_comp = chisq_res$main_effect_compare,
                    ubalanced_high_ptf = chisq_res$unbalanced_high_ptf,
                    ptf_by_low_mtf_slope = chisq_res$ptf_by_low_mtf_slope,
                    ptf_by_high_mtf_slope = chisq_res$ptf_by_high_mtf_slope,
                    low_mTF_total = sum(chisq_res$raw_table[, 1]),
                    high_mTF_total = sum(chisq_res$raw_table[, 2])
                ) %>%
                    left_join(stage3_conflicting_sign)
            })
        }
    ) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(chi2_stat)) %>%
        replace_na(list(conflicting_sign = FALSE))
}

```

```{r}
df_01 <- extract_results_df(chisq_result$stage3_bootstrap$`0.15`)
```



```{r}
# x = get_interaction_term_chi_squared(
#     jsons$ACE2,
#     predictors_df_norm,
#     response_df_norm
# )
```

```{r}
# 20250805 HAP4:HAP2 is a conflicting sign example

# plot_linear_fits(
#     predictors_df_norm,
#     response_df_norm,
#     chisq_result$`0.1`,
#     "MET32:GAL4")

plot_linear_fits(
    predictors_df_norm,
    response_df_norm,
    chisq_result$stage3_bootstrap$`0.15`,
    "ZAP1:SWI4")
```

```{r}
plot_residual_vs_binding_product <- function(
        predictors,
        residuals,
        interactor_str) {

    interactor_pair <- parse_interactor_pair(interactor_str)

    ptf <- interactor_pair$pTF
    mtf <- interactor_pair$mTF

    ptf_styled <- str_to_sentence(ptf)
    mtf_styled <- str_to_sentence(mtf)
    text_size <- 22

    # Join predictors and residuals
    df <- predictors %>%
        select(target_symbol,
               pTF_binding = !!rlang::sym(ptf),
               mTF_binding = !!rlang::sym(mtf)) %>%
        inner_join(
            residuals %>%
                select(target_symbol = target_symbol,
                       residual = !!rlang::sym(ptf)),
            by = "target_symbol"
        ) %>%
        mutate(binding_product = pTF_binding * mTF_binding)

    # Plot
    p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = binding_product, y = residual)) +
        geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 0.7) +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color="black") +
        # geom_smooth(
        #     method = "lm",
        #     formula = y ~ poly(x, 3),  # cubic fit
        #     se = FALSE,
        #     linetype="dashed",
        #     color = "purple") +

        labs(
            x = bquote(.(mtf_styled) * "*" * .(ptf_styled) * " binding " ~ "(" * LRB^2 * ")"),
            y = paste0(ptf_styled, " response (residual LRR)")
        ) +
        theme_minimal(base_size = text_size) +
        theme(
            axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = text_size * 0.8),
            axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = text_size)
        ) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-0.02, 1.02), ylim = c(-1,1))

    return(p)
}

# `residuals_normalized` is the key used in prepare_data.R / prepare_input_data.R.

# --- pre tfbpmodeling v1.0.0 ---
# x = plot_residual_vs_binding_product(
#     input_data$predictors_list$log_rank_normalized,
#     input_data$responses_list$residuals,
#     "PDR3:GAL4"
# )

x = plot_residual_vs_binding_product(
    input_data$predictors_list$log_rank_normalized,
    input_data$responses_list$residuals_normalized,
    "PDR3:GAL4"
)
```


## write results

```{r}
# --- pre tfbpmodeling v1.0.0 ---
# output_dir = here("tmp/chisq_analysis_results_20250805_v5")

output_dir <- here("plots", data_pull_date, tfbpmodeling_version, "chisq_analysis_results")

dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
for (variant in names(chisq_result)) {
    variant_dir <- file.path(output_dir, variant)
    dir.create(variant_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

    for (quant_thres in names(chisq_result[[variant]])) {
        df <- extract_results_df(chisq_result[[variant]][[quant_thres]])

        threshold_str <- paste0("threshold_", str_replace(quant_thres, "\\.", "_"))

        output_filename <- file.path(variant_dir, paste0(threshold_str, ".csv"))
        write_csv(df, output_filename)

        threshold_subdir <- file.path(variant_dir, threshold_str)
        dir.create(file.path(threshold_subdir, "two_panel"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
        dir.create(file.path(threshold_subdir, "residual"),  recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

        for (model in names(chisq_result[[variant]][[quant_thres]])) {
            for (interactor_str in names(chisq_result[[variant]][[quant_thres]][[model]])) {
                filname_interactor_str <- str_replace(interactor_str, ":", "_")

                plt_output_filename_v1 <- file.path(threshold_subdir,
                                                     "two_panel",
                                                     paste0("two_panel_",
                                                            filname_interactor_str,
                                                            ".svg"))
                plt_v1 <- plot_linear_fits(
                    predictors_df_norm,
                    response_df_norm,
                    chisq_result[[variant]][[quant_thres]],
                    interactor_str)
                ggsave(plt_output_filename_v1, plt_v1, bg="white", height=8, width=13)

                plt_output_filename_v2 <- file.path(threshold_subdir,
                                                     "residual",
                                                     paste0("residual_",
                                                            filname_interactor_str,
                                                            ".svg"))
                plt_v2 <- plot_residual_vs_binding_product(
                    input_data$predictors_list$log_rank_normalized,
                    input_data$responses_list$residuals_normalized,
                    interactor_str)
                ggsave(plt_output_filename_v2, plt_v2, bg="white", height=7, width=7)
            }
        }
    }
}
```
